title: Spot Difference Seniors
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Sharper eyes, calmer minds, and a smile worth coming back for.

This 57-page Spot the Difference activity book is built specifically for seniors, dementia care, and anyone who finds standard puzzle books too small or frustrating. Big art. Bold differences. Real satisfaction.

Who it's for:
- Seniors looking for a relaxing, screen-free brain workout
- Memory care, assisted-living, and adult day-program activity coordinators
- Caregivers searching for shared activities with loved ones in early dementia
- Adults with low vision or arthritis who can't use small puzzle books

What's inside:
- 50+ original spot-the-difference pairs - everyday scenes seniors recognize and love
- Large 8.5 x 11 inch format - easy on tired eyes
- Bold lines, generous spacing, and varied difficulty (5-10 differences per puzzle)
- Answer keys at the back so no frustration, only success
- Friendly themes: kitchens, gardens, parks, pets, holiday scenes

Spot-the-difference puzzles activate visual memory and attention - two of the first cognitive areas to soften with age. Daily 15-minute sessions are an easy, dignity-preserving habit.

A perfect gift for grandparents, parents in care, or your own quiet afternoon. Order today.
